response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct vocal performances separated by an intermission. 2. Identified first song as 'Gaze on Me!' and second as '愛♥スクリーム！' (Ai♥Scream!) from on-screen text. 3. Searched for official lyrics for both songs. 4. Created scene mapping for the two songs and the transition period. 5. Compiled the lyrics and structured the JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by IRyS, Fuwawa, and Mococo performing two songs: 'Gaze on Me!' and '愛♥スクリーム！' (Ai♥Scream!).

scenes.description: The VTubers IRyS, Fuwawa, and Mococo perform the song 'Gaze on Me!'.
scenes.original_artist: Wonder Acute, Hokko Tarumae, Copano Rickey, and others (Umamusume)

scenes.reference_lyrics_en: The second we shake everything off and run, we’ll be summer girls! The path toward my dreams leads straight ahead. I won’t let your gaze wander to anyone else. Please, Gaze on Me! A fantastic time is sure to start! (La la la la la la… My goal is the spotlight.) (La la la la la la… I’m the heroine!) (La la la la la la… Be mine, won’t you?) (Please, Gaze on Me!) (A fantastic time is sure to start!) Are y’all ready for some burning? Everyone nods, and the air heats up. OMG! The hype is just growing and growing! Let’s go! C’mon, get this sun fired up and we’ll be all set! Mate, My excitement and heart can’t lose to you. Bargaining’s a big no no! Once the gate opens, we’ll start this momentary drama. Let’s run toward summer! The second we shake everything off and run, we’ll be summer girls! The path toward my dreams leads straight ahead. I won’t let your gaze wander to anyone else. Please, Gaze on Me! A fantastic time is sure to awaken! (La la la la la la… My goal is the spotlight.) (La la la la la la… I’m the heroine!) (La la la la la la… Be mine, won’t you?) (Please, Gaze on Me!) (A fantastic time is sure to awaken!) I want to grasp the very best feeling. It envelopes my body and soul, and I get hot. Tensions rise as I head towards my desires. Now let's ride on time until it's show time! There’s no need to hesitate as we head towards the peak, And duke it out, oh oh. My scorching fate sparks my sweat and pride, Let’s take it to summer! The world I challenge is this captivating sunlight floor. Our excitement knows no limits! Let’s make this scorching season ours. Please Gaze on Me! I want this exciting time to blow your mind! (La la la la la la… My goal is the spotlight.) (La la la la la la… I’m the heroine!) (La la la la la la… Be mine, won’t you?) (Please, Gaze on Me!) (I want this exciting time to blow your mind!) It doesn’t matter who I am, Once I dash off into midsummer, I’ll be a Venus. One step into the heat makes me Change&happy Let’s take this brilliant day As if we were dancing. (C’mon, here we go!) This beat just won’t stop! Keep, give your body up to your heart’s desires. Towards burning passion, we go go! Warp, let your natural rhythm ring out, And run towards summer! The second we shake everything off and run, we’ll be summer girls! The path toward my dreams leads straight ahead. I won’t let your gaze wander to anyone else. Please, Gaze on Me! A fantastic time is sure to start! (La la la la la la… My goal is the spotlight.) (La la la la la la… I’m the heroine!) (La la la la la la… Be mine, won’t you?) (Please, Gaze on Me!) (A fantastic time is sure to start!)

scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Tell me! More about you. (Tell me more, more, more, more) Let me hear! More of your voice. (Let me hear more, more, more) I can't hold back this excitement anymore. (All I need you, Oh! All I need you) I want you to find me, the one destined for you. (One) Gather up some courage (Two) Staring strategy (Three) If our eyes meet (Fall) I can't stop. Yeah, yeah, yeah with this love, this passion. Melt, melty, I'm gonna melt away. Hey? Hey? Hey? Notice me, my darling. Reach me! I love you! I love, scream, let's shout. (Scream! Ice cream!) Ok! I love, scream! Let's shout. (Scream! Ice cream!) Ruby-chan! What do you like? More than chocolate mint, it's you. Ayumu-chan! What do you like? More than strawberry flavor, it's you. Shiki-chan! What do you like? More than cookies & cream, it's you. Everyone, what do you like? Of course, I love AiScream. I can't stop. Yeah, yeah, yeah with this love, this passion. Melt, melty, I'm gonna melt away. Hey? Hey? Hey? Notice me, my darling. Reach me! I love you! I love, scream, let's shout. (Scream! Ice cream!) Ok! I love, scream! Let's shout. (Scream! Ice cream!) Please find me, my darling. Please notice me, my darling. (One) Gather up some courage (Two) Approaching strategy (Three) When our hands touch (Fall) I can't stop. Yeah, yeah, yeah with this love, this passion. Melt, melty, I'm gonna melt away. Hey? Hey? Hey? Notice me, my darling. That's it! You! I love, scream, let's shout. (Scream! Ice cream!) Ok! I love, scream! Let's shout. (Scream! Ice cream!) I love, scream, let's shout. (Scream! Ice cream!) Ok! I love, scream! Let's shout. (Scream! Ice cream!)
